ddls:
CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., baking, culinary arts) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the judge during the competition */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the judge */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the judge */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the judge */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Average rating of the judge based on past performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the judge was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the judge's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pies" (
  "pie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pie */,
  "pie_name" TEXT /* Name of the pie */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant who submitted the pie */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the pie belongs to */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients used in the pie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pie */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the pie was submitted */,
  "serving_size" TEXT /* Serving size of the pie */,
  "preparation_time" TEXT /* Time taken to prepare the pie */,
  "baking_time" TEXT /* Time taken to bake the pie */,
  "recipe_url" TEXT /* URL to the pie's recipe */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the pie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pie (e.g., submitted, scored, disqualified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pies_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pies_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contestants" (
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contestant */,
  "contestant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contestant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contestant */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the contestant is competing in */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the contestant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the contestant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contestant */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the contestant (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the contestant's website or social media */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contestant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contestant's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contestant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contestants_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines for the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the round is held */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer responsible for the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the round was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the round's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge assignment */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned judge */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the judge is assigned to */,
  "pie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pie the judge is assigned to score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_assignments_pie_id FOREIGN KEY ("pie_id") REFERENCES pies ("pie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_assignments_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_assignments_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who gave the score */,
  "pie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pie being scored */,
  "taste_score" INTEGER /* Score for taste (1-10) */,
  "appearance_score" INTEGER /* Score for appearance (1-10) */,
  "creativity_score" INTEGER /* Score for creativity (1-10) */,
  "botanicality_score" INTEGER /* Score for botanicality (1-10) */,
  "statisticality_score" INTEGER /* Score for statisticality (1-10) */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was given */,
  "overall_score" INTEGER /* Overall score calculated from individual criteria scores */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the score was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_pie_id FOREIGN KEY ("pie_id") REFERENCES pies ("pie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_pies" (
  "round_pie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round-pie relationship */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "pie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pie in the round (e.g., submitted, scored, disqualified) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pie was added to the round */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pie's status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_pie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_pies_pie_id FOREIGN KEY ("pie_id") REFERENCES pies ("pie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_pies_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, score submission) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., pie submission, scoring page) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pie_ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "pie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pie the ingredient is used in */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient (e.g., cups, grams) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ingredient was added to the pie */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ingredient's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pie_ingredients_pie_id FOREIGN KEY ("pie_id") REFERENCES pies ("pie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pie_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who gave the comment */,
  "pie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pie the comment is for */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pie_comments_pie_id FOREIGN KEY ("pie_id") REFERENCES pies ("pie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pie_comments_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the rule applies to */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was added to the category */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_rules_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the rule applies to */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was added to the round */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_rules_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_judges" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category-judge assignment */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge assigned to the category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the judge was assigned to the category */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_judges_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_judges_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)
